examples: They pressed on without letup until they got to the top of the hill.
What we have predicted are multiple and continuous disasters, with no letup.
You have been working at a brutal pace since mid-October and there's been no letup.
The month's statistics showed a slight letup in prices of residential electric power, which slowed to 0.6% from April's increase of 1.2%.
There was no letup by the Hurricanes to start the second half.
